ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states_union_territories" (
  "state_union_territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or union territory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the state or union territory */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the state or union territory was established */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_union_territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capitals" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital */,
  "state_union_territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or union territory the capital belongs to */,
  "capital_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capital type (administrative, legislative, judiciary) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the capital */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the capital was established */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capitals_state_union_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_union_territory_id") REFERENCES states_union_territories ("state_union_territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "former_capitals" (
  "former_capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each former capital */,
  "state_union_territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or union territory the former capital belongs to */,
  "capital_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capital type (administrative, legislative, judiciary) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the former capital */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the former capital was established */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the former capital was replaced */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("former_capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_former_capitals_state_union_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_union_territory_id") REFERENCES states_union_territories ("state_union_territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_types" (
  "capital_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the capital type (administrative, legislative, judiciary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the capital type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (administrator, researcher, public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time the session started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time the session ended */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "state_union_territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or union territory the data belongs to */,
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capital the data belongs to */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type (e.g., population, area) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_capital_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_id") REFERENCES capitals ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_state_union_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_union_territory_id") REFERENCES states_union_territories ("state_union_territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., population, area) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time the update was applied */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was imported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the import */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was exported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the export */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)
